author: RamSet
releaseNotes: 0.11.0 - Reliability hardening over local HAP. Keepalive watchdog detects and reconnects a stalled/zombie live session; connect now retries on 'connection refused' (the ecobee briefly drops its HAP listener after a failed pair attempt); mDNS port discovery retries before falling back to the last-known port (the port can change after a reboot/power-cycle). Adds comfortProfile + holdEndsAt attributes (Home/Away/Sleep + active-hold end time) and a debug 'diag' flow trace. Builds on local control with no cloud/Apple hardware/bridge.
tags: Thermostat, ecobee, HomeKit, HAP, Local, Sensor

drivers.name: Ecobee HAP Thermostat
drivers.description: Local controller for an ecobee thermostat over the HomeKit Accessory Protocol (HAP): mode, setpoints, temperature, humidity, operating state, and fan.

drivers.name: Ecobee HAP Remote Sensor
drivers.description: Child device for ecobee remote sensors (temperature, occupancy, motion, battery). Created automatically by the thermostat driver.
